title: Sa9d 's Dismissal of Shu'bah and the Battle at the Fortress of al-Bahili
description: Sa9d 's Dismissal of Shu'bah and the Battle at the Fortress of al-Bahili. Recorded under the year 101 AH (720–721 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 24.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 24
